title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 29 2022
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 29 2022
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 29 2022
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 29/03/2022
DCE iron ore futures tight by 0.52%，the main contract 2209 closed 867.5, The spot quotation in the morning almost kept steady. Sometraders were active to sell, some steel mills tended to be wait-and-see, and purchasing enthusiasm is not high. SSF at Shandong port dealt 690-698 yuan/mt; decreased 5 yuan/mt over yesterday.
